thought: The founder of OpenAI is Elon Musk, along with Sam Altman and others, while the creator of C++ is Bjarne Stroustrup. There is no direct professional relationship between Elon Musk or Sam Altman and Bjarne Stroustrup that is publicly known. They are prominent figures in the tech industry but have worked in different areas: Musk and Altman in artificial intelligence and technology entrepreneurship, and Stroustrup in programming language development.
